text: Find the average of the following set of numbers: 354, 281, 623, 518, 447, 702, 876.
The body weight of six boys is recorded as 54 kg, 64 kg, 75 kg, 67 kg, 45 kg and 91 kg. What is the average body weight of all six boys?
There are six numbers 30, 72, 53, 68, x and 87, out of which x is unknown. The average of the numbers is 60. What is the value of x?
Find the average of all prime numbers between 30 and 50.
Find the average of first 40 natural numbers.
Find the average of first 20 multiples of 7.
If 25a + 25b = 115, what is the average of a and b?
The average of two numbers is XY. If one number is X, the other is:
The arithmetic mean of first 11 natural numbers is:
Find the average of all the numbers between 6 and 34 which are divisible by 5.
The average of the first five multiples of 3 is:
The average of the first nine prime numbers is:

The total marks obtained by a student in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics together is 120 more than the marks obtained by him in Chemistry. What is the average marks obtained by him in Physics and Mathematics together?
The average of the first 100 positive integers is:
The average of odd numbers up to 100 is:
In a family, the average age of a father and a mother is 35 years. The average age of the father, mother and their only son is 27 years. What is the age of the son?
The average of X1, X2 and X3 is 14. Twice the sum of X2 and X3 is 30. What is the value of X1?
If the mean of 5 observations x, x + 2, x + 4, x + 6 and x + 8 is 11, then the mean of the last three observations is:
The average of the two-digit numbers, which remain the same when the digits interchange their positions, is:
The average of a non-zero number and its square is 5 times the number. The number is:
Of four numbers whose average is 60, the first is one-fourth of the sum of the last three. The first number is:
The average of 7 consecutive numbers is 20. The largest of these numbers is:
If the arithmetic mean of seventy-five numbers is 35 and each number is increased by 5, then the mean of the new numbers is:
The average of ten numbers is 7. If each number is multiplied by 12, then the average of the new set of numbers is:
The average of ten positive numbers is x. If each number is increased by 10%, then the new average:
The average of five numbers is 27. If one number is excluded, the average becomes 25. The excluded number is:
The average weight of 8 person's increases by 2.5 kg when a new person comes in place of one of them weighing 65 kg. What is the weight of the new person?
The average of 50 numbers is 38. If two numbers, namely 45 and 55, are discarded, the average of the remaining numbers is:
The average of 5 consecutive odd numbers is 61. What is the difference between the highest and lowest numbers?
If the average of x, x+3, x+6, x+9 and x+12 is 10, then x is:
Average of all even numbers between 7 and 17 is:
In a primary school, the average weight of 100 students is 30 kg. If the weight of the principal is also included, the average weight becomes 30.5 kg. What is the weight of the principal?
The average of 3 numbers is 17 and that of the first two is 16. The third number is:
The average of 7 numbers is 5. If the average of first six numbers is 4, then the seventh number is:

The average of 4 consecutive even numbers is 27. What is the largest number?
If the sum of 5 numbers is 450, then their average is:
